# Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11

Domain invariants for contentful/rich-text.php:

PARSING
- Always use parseLocalized($data, $locale) — never the deprecated parse() — in new code.
  Missing locale causes embedded entries/assets to resolve in the default locale only (#65).
- Every NodeMapper::map() implementation must forward $locale to all recursive
  parseLocalized() calls for child nodes. Dropping the locale breaks multi-locale content.
- Node type strings in getType() must exactly match the Contentful API JSON field (e.g.,
  "embedded-asset-block", "table-header-cell"). These are map keys — typos are runtime exceptions.
- Parser::createMappers() and Renderer::createNodeRenderers() are the single source of truth
  for default node type registration. Custom extensions go through setNodeMapper() /
  pushNodeRenderer() — not by modifying the default maps.

RENDERING
- pushNodeRenderer() prepends (highest priority). appendNodeRenderer() appends (lowest priority).
  CatchAll MUST use appendNodeRenderer() — never pushNodeRenderer(). Pushing CatchAll silently
  suppresses all other renderers.
- EmbeddedImage renderer is opt-in. Do not register it in createNodeRenderers(). It must only
  be enabled via $renderer->enableEmbeddedImageRenderer(true).
- Renderer::render() throws InvalidArgumentException for unsupported nodes by default. This is
  intentional. Use CatchAll with appendNodeRenderer() for graceful degradation.

PUBLIC API / BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY
- ParserInterface, RendererInterface, NodeInterface, NodeMapperInterface, NodeRendererInterface
  are the public API. Method signature changes require a major version bump.
- AssetInterface does NOT expose getFile() or getTitle(). EmbeddedImage uses method_exists()
  duck-typing intentionally — do not add these methods to AssetInterface without a major version.
- declare(strict_types=1) is required in all PHP source files.
- PHPStan must pass at level 5. Use @phpstan-ignore-line sparingly and always with a comment.

TESTING
- Every new Node type needs: a Node class, a NodeMapper, a NodeRenderer, unit tests, and a
  fixture-based integration test.
- Integration tests use JSON fixture files from tests/Fixtures/. Do not hardcode Rich Text
  JSON inline in test methods.

VERSIONING & RELEASE
- Follow Semantic Versioning. Breaking public interface changes = major bump.
- CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] must be updated for every user-facing change before a release.
- The BC check (roave/backward-compatibility-check) is non-blocking in CI but should be
  reviewed — unexpected BC breaks must be documented and justified.
